natsServers.title: NATS Servers
natsServers.description: NATS server URLs as comma-separated values. Ex: nats://host1:4222,nats://host2:4222

jetStreamEnabled.title: JetStream Enabled
jetStreamEnabled.description: Enable JetStream to ingest Streams and Consumers metadata. If false, only core NATS subjects are ingested.

nkeySeed.title: NKey Seed
nkeySeed.description: NKey seed for NATS NKey-based authentication.

tlsConfig.title: TLS Configuration
tlsConfig.description: TLS/SSL configuration for secure NATS connections.

additionalConfig.title: Additional NATS Config
additionalConfig.description: Additional NATS client configuration options. See https://nats-io.github.io/nats.py/

schemaKvBucket.title: Schema KV Bucket
schemaKvBucket.description: Name of the JetStream KV bucket where schemas are stored. Keys must match stream names. Values should be Avro JSON, Protobuf (.proto) or JSON Schema text.

topicFilterPattern.title: Default Topic Filter Pattern
topicFilterPattern.description: Regex to only fetch subjects/streams that match the pattern.
